overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rolling grasslands. The scene begins in open prairie with scattered oak trees and transitions to approaching a rural wooden settlement visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt trail

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the dirt trail through tall grass

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt path winding through the grass
tall green grass covering rolling hills
tall green grass covering rolling hills
leafless dead tree standing on the right hillside
cluster of green oak trees on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland. Tall green grass surrounds the path with a dead tree visible on the right and oak trees clustered on the left horizon. The sky is clear with scattered clouds.

events.description: wooden buildings of a rural settlement become visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: character continues walking toward the distant settlement, approaching a large oak tree

entered.detail: cluster of wooden buildings and structures visible on the left horizon
wooden telegraph pole along the left side of the trail
rustic wooden fence posts along the right side of the path
large mature oak tree near the settlement entrance

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, a wooden settlement appears on the left horizon with buildings becoming progressively closer. The character passes the earlier oak trees and approaches a large oak tree near the settlement entrance. Wooden fence posts line the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from an open prairie into the outskirts of a rural wooden settlement. It begins with the character walking through expansive grasslands under a clear, scattered sky, flanked by tall green grass and a solitary dead tree. As the character advances, the camera passes clusters of oak trees on the left while wooden fence posts begin to line the right side of the path. The scene then opens up to reveal a settlement of wooden buildings on the horizon, which grow progressively larger and more detailed as the character approaches. Finally, the path leads directly toward the entrance of the village, passing beneath a large, prominent oak tree.
